disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Ill-defined red scaly itchy patches concentrated in the skin creases, on a background of lifelong atopy and dry skin
trigger_question_examples: Where is the rash worst — the skin creases like inner elbows and behind the knees?
Do you have a history of sensitive itchy skin, asthma or hay fever?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's worst in the creases — inner elbows, behind the knees, neck and wrists — and I have had sensitive, itchy dry skin, asthma and hay fever all my life.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No clustered punched-out monomorphic little sores and no fever/malaise (screen for herpetic complication)
trigger_question_examples: Any clusters of small, identical punched-out sores, or fever and feeling unwell?
Have you had cold sores, and are there uniform little ulcers appearing?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No little punched-out sores in clusters, and no fever — just the red weepy itchy patches.
disclosure_items.patient_deflection_template: I'm not sure what to look for.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No golden/honey crusting, spreading hot redness or fever (bacterial superinfection screen)
trigger_question_examples: Any thick golden/honey-coloured crusts, spreading hot redness, or fever?
Is the skin becoming hot and swollen with yellow crust?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No golden crusts and the skin isn't hot/spreading — no fever.
